goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the 'centre' and should serve 'chinese' food.
The restaurant should be in the 'cheap' price range.
Make sure you get 'address'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of 'hotel' and should 'include free parking'.
The hotel should be 'in the same area as the restaurant'.
Make sure you get 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the centre and should serve chinese food
The restaurant should be in the cheap price range
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of hotel and should include free parking
The hotel should be in the same area as the restaurant
